name: Kelvin Exa Search
description: AI-powered web search via the Exa /search API (https://exa.ai). Returns titles, URLs, and highlight snippets, with optional category, domain, and date filters.

num_results.description: Number of results to return (1-25, default 5).

category.description: Optional category filter. One of 'company', 'research paper', 'news', 'personal site', 'financial report', or 'people'.

include_domains.description: Optional list of domains to include in results.

exclude_domains.description: Optional list of domains to exclude from results.

start_published_date.description: Optional ISO 8601 date — only return results published on or after this date.

end_published_date.description: Optional ISO 8601 date — only return results published on or before this date.

summary.description: If true, request an LLM-generated summary alongside each result (default false).
